title: [cross-impl] RPL lollipop version comparison inconsistent across Python/Rust/Zephyr
description: Reviewed last 20 commits (mostly bd updates + merges; relevant: 563015ff9 rust/lichen-rpl/src/dodag.rs, e9938e3d2 rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs). Python/src/lichen/rpl/dodag.py uses full 128-window modular diff for circular region per RFC 6550 §7.2. Rust uses simplified lollipop_cmp (<=16 window + different linear/circular rules). Zephyr lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/dodag.c (ported from Rust) uses 16-window &0x7F diff. Same algorithm produces different behavior on version rollovers/edge cases. Breaks cross-impl test vectors and DODAG stability. Python should be oracle.
